strings.MOFFEIN_ROCKET_BODY_DESCRIPTION:
Raketarius est explosivorum peritus alta mobilitate praeditus, damnum vastativum in area inferens.<style=cSub>

< ! > Saltibus explosivorum frequentius utere ad celeri per mapam movedum et periculum vitandum!

< ! > Tuus iaculatorem granadarum hostes bene repellit. Eo utere ad hostes de marginibus deiiciendos.

< ! > Detonator Remotus ad hostes volantes feriendos utilis est et etiam pro mobilitate adhiberi potest.

< ! > C-4 tam ad damnum in area quam ad mobilitatem aptum est.

< ! > Rearmatio Celeris adhiberi potest ad longam raketarii tui recaricationem vitandam.
strings.MOFFEIN_ROCKET_BODY_MAIN_ENDING_ESCAPE_F: ...et sic oblitteratus est, terram numquam tangens.
strings.MOFFEIN_ROCKET_BODY_LORE: Bio: Raketarius natus est cum lend-lease in munitionibus et iaculo in manu
strings.MOFFEIN_ROCKET_BODY_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Explosiones tuae adhiberi possunt pro <style=cIsUtility>saltu explosivo</style>.
strings.MOFFEIN_ROCKET_BODY_PRIMARY_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Agilitas</style>. Iacit raketarium inferens <style=cIsDamage>600% damni</style>. Usque 4 raketaria accumulare potest.
strings.MOFFEIN_ROCKET_BODY_PRIMARY_ALT_DESCRIPT: <style=cIsUtility>Agilitas</style>. Iacit raketarium <style=cIsUtility>sequens</style> cum <style=cIsHealth>radio explosivo minore</style>, inferens <style=cIsDamage>600% damni</style>. Usque 4 raketaria accumulare potest.
strings.MOFFEIN_ROCKET_BODY_SECONDARY_DESCRIPTIO: Detonat <style=cIsDamage>omnia explosiva</style>. Raketaria detonata <style=cIsDamage>50%</style> additionalis <style=cIsDamage>damni</style> et <style=cIsDamage>radii explosivi</style> gignunt.
strings.MOFFEIN_ROCKET_BODY_UTILITY_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Attonitans</style>. Iacta fasciculum explosivum. <style=cIsDamage>Detonatore Remoto</style> utere ad detonandum et <style=cIsDamage>1200% damni</style> inferendum.
strings.MOFFEIN_ROCKET_BODY_UTILITY_ALT_DESCRIPT: <style=cIsUtility>Grave</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Attonitans</style>. Vibra palam explosivam ad hostem inferens <style=cIsDamage>1200% damni</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Ictus criticos</style> infert dum <style=cIsUtility>saltu explosivo</style>.
strings.MOFFEIN_ROCKET_BODY_UTILITY_ALT_SCEPTER_: <style=cIsUtility>Grave</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Attonitans</style>. Vibra palam explosivam ad hostem inferens <style=cIsDamage>1800% damni</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Ictus criticos</style> infert dum <style=cIsUtility>saltu explosivo</style>.
strings.MOFFEIN_ROCKET_BODY_SPECIAL_DESCRIPTION: Celeriter <style=cIsDamage>4 raketaria iacit</style> et <style=cIsUtility>arma tua recarcat</style>.
strings.MOFFEIN_ROCKET_BODY_SPECIAL_SCEPTER_DESC: Celeriter <style=cIsDamage>10 raketaria iacit</style> et <style=cIsUtility>arma tua recarcat</style>.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_MOFFEINROCKETCLEARGAMEMONSOO: Ut Raketarius, perage ludum vel oblittera in Monsoon.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_MOFFEINROCKETCLEARGAMETYPHOO:
Ut Raketarius, perage ludum vel oblittera in Typhoon vel Eclipse.
<color=#8888>(Difficultas Typhoon Starstorm 2 requirit)</color>
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_MOFFEINROCKETMARKETGARDENUNL: Ut Raketarius, explode 10 vicibus continenter terram non tangens.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_MOFFEINROCKETHOMINGUNLOCK_DE: Ut Raketarius, porta Caelestis 25 minutis vel minus attinge et transi.
